title: Full Pattern — Course API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Course API using ALL patterns. Entity + Service + DTO + Custom Queries.

### Requirements

- `Course` entity: `id` (Long), `title` (String), `instructor` (String), `category` (String), `maxStudents` (Integer), `enrolledStudents` (Integer), `price` (Double)
- `CourseRequestDTO`: `title`, `instructor`, `category`, `maxStudents`, `enrolledStudents`, `price`
- `CourseResponseDTO`: `id`, `title`, `instructor`, `category`, `maxStudents`, `enrolledStudents`, `price`, `spotsLeft` (maxStudents - enrolledStudents — COMPUTED)
- `CourseRepository` with: `findByCategory(String)`, `findByInstructor(String)`
- `CourseService`, `CourseController` at `/api/courses`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/courses` → all (200)
- `GET /api/courses/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/courses/category/{category}` → by category (200)
- `GET /api/courses/instructor/{instructor}` → by instructor (200)
- `POST /api/courses` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/courses/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/courses/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)
